Your flight information

Departure time - 17:55
Arrival time - 20:35
(BGY) - (ARN)

Mr TEST PASSENGER
●Flight out:FR2878
Mrs TEST PASSENGER TWO
●Flight out:FR2878

Receipt:
Total price of your trip purchased via Applepay Visa ending in: 2168245.84 EUR
VAT is not applicable on international flights however domestic flights may be subject to local VAT.

Change your name, flights and more in your myRyanair account.
Manage Booking
Ryanair Travel Essentials
Fast Track
Get through airport security in 5 minutes or less with a dedicated line.
Add now
 
Airport Transfers
Private car, bus, shuttle or train? How you get to your destination is up to you.
Add now
Car Hire
With our Price Match Guarantee, you won’t find a better deal.
See deal
 
Parking at the airport
You can reserve secure airport parking with Ryanair.
Add now
Priority & 2 Cabin Bags
If you want to bring 2 cabin bags on board you must add Priority & 2 Cabin Bags.
Add now
 
Change your seat
You can change your seat up to 2 hours before you're due to take off.
Book now
Make the most of what Ryanair has to offer.
Add more bags
You can add up to 3 x 20kg bags to your trip up to 2 hours before you fly.
Add now
 
Ryanair Rooms
High quality rooms at affordable prices. Book a stay for under £99 per night.
See more
Inflight magazine
Download and browse our inflight magazine before you fly.
Download now
 
Travel Insurance
Secure peace of mind for your trip by adding Travel Insurance.
Add now
Day of Travel App Assistant
When it's time to fly, our Day of Travel Assistant will make your journey through the airport easier. Get live updates and notifications on your terminal, gate and flight straight to your phone. During major disruptions, receive regular video updates from our Operations Centre, keeping you up to date on how your disruption is being resolved.
Connect with us
Download our App now!
Payment options
2025 Ryanair DAC   |   General T&Cs   |   Privacy Policy   |   Contact Us

If you have booked a combination of travel services together (e.g. any two of flight, hotel or car hire) we will be fully responsible for the proper performance of the package. Additionally, we have protection in place to ensure you are refunded any unused services and, where a flight is included, to ensure your repatriation in the unlikely event we become insolvent. You can find more information here
Alternatively, if the above does not apply and you booked one or more additional travel services with us within 24 hours of having booked the first travel service with us (i.e. booking TESTRF or car hire which is linked to a flight booked within the previous 24 hours) you will benefit from all EU rights applying to such linked travel arrangements and will also be covered by our insolvency protection which ensures you are refunded any unused services and, where a flight is included, that you are repatriated in the unlikely event we become insolvent. For more information on insolvency protection, click here
Learn more about reserved seating here
For more information about our bags policy, click here
Version: +1 555 000 0000
